title: iris angustifolia
intro: Iris angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved iris, is a flowering plant species in the iris family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Iris angustifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Iris angustifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
